role: Shared pure presentation renderer and source adapters for the gallery surface, plus live V-wheel interaction binding and async address-resolution integration.
capabilities: Render a normalised unit as an immersive phone-screen DOM (renderUnit)
Resolve and render decision:// addresses through the generic archetype renderer (renderDecisionGallery)
Inline the Vi logo SVG asset
Inline a ConceptV icon set and render themed SVG icons
Render the V corner hub with a 90° arc of verb sockets (veeCorner)
Bind V wheel tap interactions (open/close, socket fire, tap-away close)
Define canonical circuit-verb socket set (drill, mark, ask, dials, source)
Deterministically transform a corpus digest into editorial voice text
Adapt corpus common_knowledge records into normalised units
Adapt authored story-tree nodes into normalised units
Normalise neighbour recall scores into weighted constellation nodes
Resolve run:// addresses via API and render the gallery
Bind projection:select drill-in events to gallery rendering
Handle gallery:write-error events for decision cards
substance_why: The file implements multiple DOM renderers, source adapters, inline SVG assets, V-wheel geometry/interaction, and async API integration with degrade paths.
interactions_present: V hub tap toggles the 90° socket wheel open/closed
V socket tap dispatches a vee:socket CustomEvent and flashes a transient confirmation
Tap on the V overlay background closes the wheel
projection:select listener triggers async gallery rendering
gallery:write-error listener invokes _showWriteError on matching decision cards
interactions_missing: No actual implementation of V verbs (drill, mark, ask, dials, source) — only events are emitted
No keyboard or focus/ARIA management for the V wheel
No click binding for data-anchorable targets or neighbour re-drill
No click handler for unit action buttons or piece pins/rows
No loading state during async address resolution
No explicit error UI beyond a degraded text card on fetch failure
No resize/orientation handling for V geometry or form factor
No decision-card option/take click binding wired here (relies on external galleryBinder.decide)
No href navigation for rendered action links
performance_risks: innerHTML string building for every renderUnit/renderPiece call reconstructs the whole screen DOM
Sequential network waterfall in renderGallery (corpus fetch, then optional neighbours fetch)
Rapid projection:select events can trigger repeated fetches and full DOM rebuilds without debounce
V corner geometry recomputed per call with Math.sin/cos instead of pure CSS
Large inline SVG/icon strings retained on the global DNA object for the lifetime of the page
No caching of rendered units or resolved records across re-renders
reuse_why: The normalised-unit renderer and source-adapter pattern are worth keeping, but the file mixes presentation, interaction, async orchestration, and inline assets and should be split and modernized.
decomposition_hints: Split pure renderers (renderUnit, renderPiece) from source adapters (unitFromCorpus, unitFromStory, voiceFromDigest, neighboursToNodes)
Split V wheel geometry, icons, logo, and interaction binding into a self-contained component module
Split async gallery orchestration (renderGallery, bindProjectionDrill) from DOM rendering
Split decision-card integration (renderDecisionGallery, write-error listener) from unit gallery integration
Move inline SVG assets and icon map into an asset loader or imported SVG/CSS files
Keep phone.css as the single presentation token source and remove bespoke inline styles
